page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of system memory. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance utilizes an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a base frequency of 3.2 GHz. The CPU configuration features 8 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated, non-shared compute resources managed via a KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating systems and data. Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. The hardware profile offers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads requiring significant memory capacity without the overhead of excessive compute cores.

Given the memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:8 and the dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.r9i.2xlarge is designed for memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include relational and non-relational database caching layers, in-memory data stores, enterprise resource planning systems, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.2xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, delivering an 8.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at 3.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, this KVM-based instance provides dedicated compute resources with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. The high memory density relative to compute resources makes this instance a qualitatively cost-effective choice for memory-bound workloads. It is well-suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, enterprise applications, and data processing tasks that demand consistent memory performance without requiring high-density GPU acceleration or local NVMe storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for demanding database and caching workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing an 8:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio
